parse.description: parse(null) returns null when version is null (r0 == null)
parse("") returns null when trimmed string is empty and parser throws
parse("  ") returns null when trimmed whitespace yields empty string and parser throws
parse("1.2") returns null when version missing patch and parser throws
parse("1.2.3") returns a Semver object for a valid simple version
parse.expectedResult: return value is non-null and getVersion()=="1.2.3"

parse.description: parse("  1.2.3-beta.4+exp.sha ") returns Semver with pre-release and build after trimming
